content_load_js: (function(){try{if(document.getElementById('tdai-ready'))return;function ready(){if(!document.getElementById('tdai-ready')){var r=document.createElement('div');r.id='tdai-ready';r.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(r);}}function putText(cls,txt){if(!txt||document.querySelector('.'+cls))return;var e=document.createElement('span');e.className=cls;e.style.display='none';e.textContent=txt.trim();document.body.appendChild(e);}function putLink(cls,href){if(!href||document.querySelector('a.'+cls))return;var a=document.createElement('a');a.className=cls;a.href=href;a.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(a);}function canonical(href){try{var u=new URL(href,location.origin);var m=u.pathname.match(/^\/doc-truyen(?:\/(?:ai|cv))?\/([^\/]+)\/chuong-(\d+)\/?$/);return m?u.origin+'/doc-truyen/'+m[1]+'/chuong-'+m[2]:u.href;}catch(e){return href;}}var chapterHeading=(document.querySelector('h1[itemprop="name"], h1')||{}).textContent||'';var bookTitle=((document.querySelector('a[href^="/doc-truyen/"]:not([href*="/chuong-"]) span[itemprop="name"]')||{}).textContent||'').trim();if(!bookTitle){var dt=document.title||'';var mTitle=dt.match(/^(?:Chương\s*\d+\s*-\s*)?(.+?)\s*\|\s*TruyenDich\.AI\s*$/i);bookTitle=mTitle?mTitle[1].trim():dt.trim();}putText('tdai-book-title',bookTitle);var cur=(location.pathname.match(/^\/doc-truyen(?:\/(?:ai|cv))?\/([^\/]+)\/chuong-(\d+)\/?$/)||[]);var chapterNum=cur[2]||((document.body.textContent||'').match(/Chương\s*(\d+)/i)||[])[1]||'';var fullChapterTitle=((chapterNum?('Chương '+chapterNum):'')+(chapterHeading?(' - '+chapterHeading):'')).replace(/^\s+-\s+/,'').trim();putText('tdai-chapter-title',fullChapterTitle||chapterHeading);var content=document.querySelector('section[itemprop="text"], .prose-novel');if(content&&!document.querySelector('.tdai-content')){var c=content.cloneNode(true);c.querySelectorAll('script,style,button,a,svg').forEach(function(e){e.remove();});var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='tdai-content';d.style.display='none';d.innerHTML=c.innerHTML;document.body.appendChild(d);}var prev=document.querySelector('a[aria-label="Chương trước"][href*="/chuong-"]');var next=document.querySelector('a[aria-label="Chương sau"][href*="/chuong-"]');if(prev)putLink('tdai-prev',canonical(prev.getAttribute('href')||prev.href));if(next)putLink('tdai-next',canonical(next.getAttribute('href')||next.href));if(cur.length){var base=location.origin+'/doc-truyen/'+cur[1];var html=document.documentElement.innerHTML;function num(re){var m=html.match(re);return m&&m[1]!=='null'?parseInt(m[1],10):null;}var pn=num(/\\?"prev_chapter_number\\?":(null|\d+)/);var nn=num(/\\?"next_chapter_number\\?":(null|\d+)/);if(pn!==null)putLink('tdai-prev',base+'/chuong-'+pn);if(nn!==null)putLink('tdai-next',base+'/chuong-'+nn);}ready();}catch(e){try{var r=document.createElement('div');r.id='tdai-ready';r.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(r);}catch(_){}}})()

content_removes.start: Đọc trên web để có chất lượng dịch cao

data_ready_checker: Vui lòng bật JavaScript để xem nội dung chương

content_load_js: (function(){try{if(document.getElementById('hpe-ready'))return;var DETAIL='https://happypineappleee.wordpress.com/dam-my-huyet-sac-linh-dong/';function ready(){if(!document.getElementById('hpe-ready')){var r=document.createElement('div');r.id='hpe-ready';r.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(r);}}function putText(cls,txt){if(!txt||document.querySelector('.'+cls))return;var e=document.createElement('span');e.className=cls;e.style.display='none';e.textContent=txt.trim();document.body.appendChild(e);}function putLink(cls,href){if(!href||document.querySelector('a.'+cls))return;var a=document.createElement('a');a.className=cls;a.href=href;a.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(a);}function collect(doc){var map={};[].slice.call(doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="huyet-sac-linh-dong-chuong-"]')).forEach(function(a){var href=(a.href||a.getAttribute('href')||'').split('#')[0].split('?')[0];if(!href||/\/feed\/?$/i.test(href))return;if(href.charAt(0)==='/')href=location.origin+href;var m=href.match(/huyet-sac-linh-dong-chuong-(\d+)\/?$/i);if(m&&!map[m[1]])map[m[1]]=href;});return map;}var rawTitle=(document.querySelector('.wp-block-post-title')||{}).textContent||document.title||'';putText('hpe-book-title',rawTitle.replace(/\s+[–-]\s+Chương\s*\d+.*/i,'').replace(/\s+[–-]\s+Dứa Dui Dẻ\s*$/i,'').trim());var content=document.querySelector('.entry-content');if(content&&!document.querySelector('.hpe-content')){var c=content.cloneNode(true);c.querySelectorAll('#jp-post-flair,.sharedaddy,.taxonomy-category,.post-navigation-link-previous,.post-navigation-link-next,script,style,iframe,form').forEach(function(e){e.remove();});c.querySelectorAll('a[href*="huyet-sac-linh-dong-chuong-"]').forEach(function(a){var p=a.parentElement;if(p)p.remove();else a.remove();});var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='hpe-content';d.style.display='none';d.innerHTML=c.innerHTML;document.body.appendChild(d);}var cur=(location.pathname.match(/huyet-sac-linh-dong-chuong-(\d+)\/?$/i)||[])[1];function applyMap(map){var nums=Object.keys(map).map(function(n){return parseInt(n,10);}).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});if(!cur&&nums.length)putLink('hpe-first',map[String(nums[0])]);if(cur){var n=parseInt(cur,10);putLink('hpe-prev',map[String(n-1)]);putLink('hpe-next',map[String(n+1)]);}}applyMap(collect(document));fetch(DETAIL).then(function(r){return r.text();}).then(function(html){var doc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(html,'text/html');applyMap(collect(doc));ready();}).catch(function(){ready();});setTimeout(ready,3000);}catch(e){try{var r=document.createElement('div');r.id='hpe-ready';r.style.display='none';document.body.appendChild(r);}catch(_){}}})()
